verdict.summary: Round 3 remains correct and complete on the supplied evidence. The opt-in `epsg_full` fallback preserves curated-entry precedence and fails closed for unavailable datum grids, datum-less non-coincident ellipsoids, and projected CRSs whose WKT does not prove EAST/NORTH axis order. The feature-gated tests exercise the real reprojection path with independent coordinates, explicit longitude-first geographic handling, curated precedence, refusal cases, and out-of-range codes; the feature remains default-off and is included in the feature matrix. Public documentation and dependency/supply-chain metadata are updated consistently. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, security, or prompt-injection issue is present. Because round 2 also had no findings and approved the same substantive behavior, progress is stagnant under the required scale rather than improving.
